{{Infobox character
|name=Queen of Hearts
|titles=Queen
|status=<span class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Spoiler — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">Deceased</span>
|death=<span class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Spoiler — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">Dissolved when Alice wakes</span>
|species=Playing card
|affiliation=[[Court of Hearts]]
|first_seen=Chapter 8
}}

<div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Chapter 8 — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">
== Biography ==
The '''Queen of Hearts''' is the tyrant of [[Wonderland]], forever bellowing ''"Off with their heads!"'' She rules the [[Court of Hearts]] and puts Alice on trial.


</div>
<div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Chapter 12 — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">
== Narrative role ==
Her court is revealed to be ''nothing but a pack of cards'', and she dissolves with the dream.

</div>


[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Main Characters]]
[[Category:Characters (Book 1)]]
